textByHashes.0329963cc133989c68fbd4f7792408e69527af6b: I have not seen this before. Your donation to the library is appreciated.
textByHashes.05bdb4040d098a5a619cc989b36bbcce6296b36b: Again, your donation to the library is appreciated
textByHashes.b2af681fb07df93d6d3c23fe1b519eefcd1a8f9d: Your contributions to the library have been noticed. We would like to reward you for your assistance.
textByHashes.3ce8471a1436cc7d0f251e4951f97544e9d326b4: If you find any spare pages for these books I would be willing to give you 1,000 gold for each one. Duplicate sources of information are always useful.
